bug.description: integer underflow producing an unexpectedly large unsigned value

prompt:
There is a integer underflow producing an unexpectedly large unsigned value downstream of function pack_nb_iot_rssi_request_value in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi/src/nfapi_p4.c:88.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
